```{r}
  model <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(predictors, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- glm(model, data = df, family = binomial())

  robust <- sandwich::vcovHC(fit, type = "HC0")
  table <-
    lmtest::coeftest(fit, vcov. = robust) %>%
    broom::tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), exp)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Predictors = term,
      `Odds Ratios (OR)` = round(estimate, 2),
      SE = round(std.error, 2),
      `Z-scores` = statistic,
      `P-values` = round(p.value, 3),
      `CI (low)` = round(conf.low, 2),
      `CI (high)` = round(conf.high, 2)
    )
  list(fit = fit, table = table, predictors = predictors)
}


# ---- Bootstrap summary + comparison blocks ----------------------------------

#' Summarise a raw bootstrap object (cheap; re-run freely)
#'
#' @param raw Output of [bootstrap_lasso_raw()].
#' @param alpha Percentile-CI level.
#' @return Tibble with conditional/unconditional OR, CIs, p-values, and the
#'   distribution of the native one-sided selective p.
#' @importFrom purrr map_dfr
#' @importFrom dplyr filter arrange desc
#' @export
summarize_bootstrap <- function(raw, alpha = 0.05) {
  B <- raw$B_valid
  qlo <- alpha / 2
  qhi <- 1 - alpha / 2
  perc_p <- function(v) pmin(1, 2 * min(mean(v <= 0), mean(v >= 0)))
  purrr::map_dfr(raw$terms, function(v) {
    d <- dplyr::filter(raw$draws, term == v)
    lo <- d$log_or
    nch <- length(lo)
    loall <- c(lo, rep(0, B - nch))
    cc <- exp(quantile(lo, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE))
    uu <- exp(quantile(loall, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE))
    sp <- quantile(d$si_p, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE)
    tibble::tibble(
      term = v,
      n_chosen = nch,
      pct_chosen = 100 * nch / B,
      OR_cond = exp(median(lo)),
      OR_uncond = exp(median(loall)),
      SE = sd(lo),
      ci_cond = ci_str(cc[1], cc[2]),
      ci_uncond = ci_str(uu[1], uu[2]),
      si_pval_median = median(d$si_p, na.rm = TRUE),
      si_pval_int = ci_str(sp[1], sp[2]),
      cond_pval = perc_p(lo),
      uncond_pval = perc_p(loall)
    )
  }) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(pct_chosen))
}


# ---- Combined-table adapters (one row per term, prefixed columns) -----------

#' Selective-inference block at 95% + 90%, one-sided p (internal to the export)
#' @keywords internal
si_block <- function(x, y, k) {
  f95 <- suppressMessages(fit_selective_lasso(x, y, alpha = 0.05, k = k, nfolds = 10))
  f90 <- suppressMessages(fit_selective_lasso(x, y, alpha = 0.10, k = k, nfolds = 10))
  f95$table %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      term,
      OR = odds_ratio,
      SE = NA_real_,
      ci95 = ci_str(ci_lo, ci_hi),
      pval = pvalue,
      pval_1sided = pvalue_1sided
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      f90$table %>% dplyr::transmute(term, ci90 = ci_str(ci_lo, ci_hi)),
      by = "term"
    )
}

#' Bootstrap block for the combined table (internal)
#' @keywords internal
boot_block <- function(raw, alpha = 0.05) {
  B <- raw$B_valid
  qlo <- alpha / 2
  qhi <- 1 - alpha / 2
  perc_p <- function(v) pmin(1, 2 * min(mean(v <= 0), mean(v >= 0)))
  purrr::map_dfr(raw$terms, function(v) {
    d <- dplyr::filter(raw$draws, term == v)
    lo <- d$log_or
    nch <- length(lo)
    loall <- c(lo, rep(0, B - nch))
    cc <- exp(quantile(lo, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE))
    uu <- exp(quantile(loall, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE))
    sp <- quantile(d$si_p, c(qlo, qhi), names = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE)
    tibble::tibble(
      term = v,
      n_chosen = nch,
      pct_chosen = 100 * nch / B,
      OR_cond = exp(median(lo)),
      OR_uncond = exp(median(loall)),
      SE = sd(lo),
      ci_cond = ci_str(cc[1], cc[2]),
      ci_uncond = ci_str(uu[1], uu[2]),
      si_pval_median = median(d$si_p, na.rm = TRUE),
      si_pval_int = ci_str(sp[1], sp[2]),
      cond_pval = perc_p(lo),
      uncond_pval = perc_p(loall)
    )
  })
}

#' Split block for the combined table (combined CI into one string) (internal)
#' @keywords internal
split_block <- function(x, y, n_splits = 1000) {
  fit_split_lasso(x, y, n_splits = n_splits, nfolds = 10) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      term,
      OR = OR,
      SE = SE,
      ci = ci_str(ci_lo, ci_hi),
      pval = pval,
      n_tested = n_tested,
      pct_tested = pct_tested
    )
}


# ---- The one orchestrator ---------------------------------------------------

#' Run every method across all conditions and write the CSVs
#'
#' @description
#' Applies selective inference (optimal + min lambda), the bootstrap, the split
#' method, and Firth to each condition; attaches univariable, multivariable,
#' stepwise (logistic) and native fs to the `all` rows; and writes each method's
#' own CSV plus one combined file. Key parameters are surfaced explicitly even
#' where defaults exist, so the run is self-documenting.
#'
#' @param conditions Named list; each element has `x`, `y` (and any metadata).
#' @param raw_all Named list of [bootstrap_lasso_raw()] outputs, one per condition.
#' @param uni_table Univariable tibble for the `all` rows.
#' @param multi_by_condition Named list mapping condition -> multivariable tibble
#'   (or `NULL`).
#' @param step_fit Output of [fit_stepwise()] (uses its `native`/`logistic`).
#' @param csv_folder Directory to write CSVs into.
#' @param nfolds,n_splits,boot_alpha Surfaced key parameters.
#' @return The combined tibble (invisibly written to disk as well).
#' @importFrom purrr imap imap_dfr reduce
#' @importFrom dplyr bind_rows full_join mutate arrange desc select starts_with
#'   transmute if_any
#' @importFrom readr write_csv
#' @export
run_all_methods <- function(
    conditions,
    raw_all,
    uni_table,
    multi_by_condition,
    step_fit,
    csv_folder,
    nfolds = 10,
    n_splits = 1000,
    boot_alpha = 0.05
) {

  # ---- Per-condition, stacked (boot first so its si_pval leads) -------------
  per_cond <-
    purrr::imap(conditions, function(cond, name) {
      lopt <- si_block(cond$x, cond$y, k = NULL)
      vars_opt <- lopt$term

      blocks <- list(
        boot_block(raw_all[[name]], alpha = boot_alpha) %>% prefix_cols("boot_lasso"),
        lopt %>% prefix_cols("lasso_opt"),
        si_block(cond$x, cond$y, k = 0) %>% prefix_cols("lasso_min"),
        split_block(cond$x, cond$y, n_splits = n_splits) %>% prefix_cols("split"),
        fit_firth(cond$x, cond$y, vars_opt) %>% prefix_cols("firth")
      )
      m <- multi_by_condition[[name]]
      if (!is.null(m)) {
        blocks <- c(blocks, list(norm_orlike(m) %>% prefix_cols("multi")))
      }
      purrr::reduce(blocks, dplyr::full_join, by = "term") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(condition = name, .before = 1)
    })

  combined <- dplyr::bind_rows(per_cond)

  # ---- uni + step (logistic) + fs (native) on the "all" rows only -----------
  extra_all <-
    purrr::reduce(
      list(
        norm_orlike(uni_table) %>% prefix_cols("uni"),
        step_fit$logistic %>% prefix_cols("step"),
        step_fit$native %>% prefix_cols("fs")
      ),
      dplyr::full_join,
      by = "term"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(condition = "all")

  combined <-
    combined %>%
    dplyr::full_join(extra_all, by = c("condition", "term")) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(condition, dplyr::desc(boot_lasso_pct_chosen))

  # ---- Write each method + the combined file --------------------------------
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(combined),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_combined_all_methods.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(purrr::imap_dfr(conditions, function(cond, name) {
      si_block(cond$x, cond$y, NULL) %>% dplyr::mutate(condition = name, .before = 1)
    })),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_lasso_optimal.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(purrr::imap_dfr(conditions, function(cond, name) {
      si_block(cond$x, cond$y, 0) %>% dplyr::mutate(condition = name, .before = 1)
    })),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_lasso_min.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(purrr::imap_dfr(raw_all, function(raw, name) {
      boot_block(raw, alpha = boot_alpha) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(condition = name, .before = 1)
    })),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_bootstrap.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(purrr::imap_dfr(conditions, function(cond, name) {
      split_block(cond$x, cond$y, n_splits = n_splits) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(condition = name, .before = 1)
    })),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_split.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(
      combined %>%
        dplyr::select(condition, term, dplyr::starts_with("firth_")) %>%
        dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_any(dplyr::starts_with("firth_"), ~ !is.na(.)))
    ),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_firth.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(step_fit$logistic),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_stepwise_logistic.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    round_readable(step_fit$native),
    file.path(csv_folder, "results_fs_native_linear.csv")
  )

  invisible(combined)
}
```



# Write

## Setup

Create the necessary directories.

```{r, results="hold"}
# Get today's date
today <- Sys.Date()
today <- format(today, "%Y-%m-%d")

# Create folder names
base_folder <- file.path(DST_DIRNAME, ANALYSIS_NAME)
date_folder <- file.path(base_folder, today)
csv_folder <- file.path(date_folder, "csv")
pdf_folder <- file.path(date_folder, "pdf")
html_folder <- file.path(date_folder, "html")

# Create folders
suppressWarnings(dir.create(base_folder))
suppressWarnings(dir.create(date_folder))
suppressWarnings(dir.create(csv_folder))
suppressWarnings(dir.create(pdf_folder))
suppressWarnings(dir.create(html_folder))

# Print folder names
print(base_folder)
print(date_folder)
print(csv_folder)
print(pdf_folder)
print(html_folder)
```

## Models

```{r}
# Dedicated folder for reloadable model objects (idempotent)
models_folder <- file.path(date_folder, "models")
suppressWarnings(dir.create(models_folder))

# Full fit objects for provenance and posterity
saveRDS(
  list(
    results = results,          # per-condition fit objects (incl. raw $fit)
    summary = summary_tbl,      # the flattened table
    conditions = conditions,    # which x / y went into each (provenance)
    provenance = list(
      date = Sys.time(),
      outcome = CHOSEN_OUTCOME,
      config = params$CONFIG,
      proportion = params$PROPORTION_OF_DATA,
      seed = 141845,
      r_version = R.version.string,
      glmnet = as.character(packageVersion("glmnet")),
      selectiveInference = as.character(packageVersion("selectiveInference"))
    )
  ),
  file = file.path(models_folder, "selective_lasso_results.rds")
)
```


## Figures

Write all figures from the selective inference modeling.

```{r}
# Forest plots to PDF (loops over every condition)
for (name in names(conditions)) {
  res <- results[[name]]
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(res$table) == 0) next
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(pdf_folder, paste0(conditions[[name]]$plot_name, ".pdf")),
    plot = plots[[conditions[[name]]$plot_name]],
    width = 8,
    height = 6
  )
}
```


```{r}
# Save
ggsave(
  file.path(pdf_folder, "sm_grade_vs_complications_bar_chart.pdf"),
  plot = plots$sm_grade_vs_complications_bar_chart,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
# Save
ggsave(
  file.path(pdf_folder, "odds_ratios_all_predictors.pdf"),
  plot = plots$odds_ratios_all_predictors,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
# Save
ggsave(
  file.path(pdf_folder, "odds_ratios_with_components.pdf"),
  plot = plots$odds_ratios_with_components,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
# Save
ggsave(
  file.path(pdf_folder, "odds_ratios_without_components.pdf"),
  plot = plots$odds_ratios_without_components,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)
```

```{r}
# Save
if (with(plots, exists("odds_ratios_with_components_no_surgery"))) {
  ggsave(
    file.path(pdf_folder, "odds_ratios_with_components_no_surgery.pdf"),
    plot = plots$odds_ratios_with_components_no_surgery,
    width = 8,
    height = 6
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Save
if (with(plots, exists("odds_ratios_without_components_no_surgery"))) {
  ggsave(
    file.path(pdf_folder, "odds_ratios_without_components_no_surgery.pdf"),
    plot = plots$odds_ratios_without_components_no_surgery,
    width = 8,
    height = 6
  )
}
```

```{r}
# # Start graphic device
# pdf(
#   file = file.path(pdf_folder, "forest-plot_frequentist.pdf"),
#   width = 10,
#   height = 15
# )
#
# # Plot
# plots$forest_plot_frequentist
#
# # Shut down device
# dev.off()
```


## Tables

Selective inference modeling.

```{r}
# Human-readable combined table (one row per selected term, all conditions)
write_csv(
  summary_tbl,
  file.path(csv_folder, "selective_lasso_summary.csv")
)
```


```{r}
# # Arguments
# df <- tables$desc_stats_cohorts_cv_prolaio
# filepath_csv <- file.path(csv_folder, "desc-stats_by-cohort_cov.csv")
# filepath_html <- file.path(html_folder, "desc-stats_by-cohort_cov.html")
#
# # Save as CSV
# write_csv(
#   x = df,
#   file = filepath_csv
# )
#
# # Save as HTML
# # - Save pdf does not work with webshot
# # - It works with pagedown but not as pretty as desired
# df %>%
#   sable() %>%
#   kableExtra::save_kable(file = filepath_html)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  univariable_unadjusted,
  file.path(csv_folder, "univariable_unadjusted.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  univariable_adjusted,
  file.path(csv_folder, "univariable_adjusted.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  univariable_adjusted_recoded,
  file.path(csv_folder, "univariable_adjusted_recoded.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  univariable_adjusted_recoded_interactions,
  file.path(csv_folder, "univariable_adjusted_recoded_interactions.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  multivariable_pvalue_without_scores,
  file.path(csv_folder, "multivariable_pvalue_without_scores.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  multivariable_pvalue_without_components,
  file.path(csv_folder, "multivariable_pvalue_without_components.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  multivariable_pvalue_sm_grade,
  file.path(csv_folder, "multivariable_pvalue_sm_grade.csv")
)
```

```{r}
write_csv(
  multivariable_pvalue_had_surgery,
  file.path(csv_folder, "multivariable_pvalue_had_surgery.csv")
)
```

## Data

Write all data.

```{r}
# # Arguments
# df <- study
# filename <- paste0(ANALYSIS_NAME, "_", today, ".csv")
# filepath_csv <- file.path(DST_BUCKET, dst_dirname_data, filename)
#
# # Save as CSV
# write_csv(
#   x = df,
#   file = filepath_csv
# )
```


------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Reproducibility

## Linting and styling

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Style current file
styler::style_file(
  path = rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path,
  style = styler::tidyverse_style
)

# Lint current file
lintr::lint(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
```


## Dependency management

```{r, eval=FALSE, results="hide"}
# Clean up project of libraries not in use
# (use prompt = FALSE to avoid the interactive session)
# (packages can only be removed in interactive mode b/c this is destructive)
renv::clean(prompt = TRUE)

# Update lock file with new packages
renv::snapshot()
```


## Containerization

```{r}
# Only run this if option is set to TRUE
if (UPDATE_DOCKERFILE) {
  # Create a dockerfile from the session info
  my_dockerfile <- containerit::dockerfile(from = sessionInfo(), env = ls())
  # Write file
  write(my_dockerfile, file = "~/Dockerfile")
  # Print
  print(my_dockerfile)
}
```


------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Documentation {.tabset}

## Session Info

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
print(sessionInfo(), locale = FALSE)
```

## References

```{r refs, echo=FALSE}
(.packages()) %>%
  sort() %>%
  lapply(citation) %>%
  lapply(c) %>%
  unique()
```
